{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Human Resources Manager (Male)",
  "description": "Jodazen Integrated Services is a trusted partner for businesses and individuals seeking seamless HR and travel solutions.

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Human Resources Manager (Male)

Job Location: Mile 2, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Manufacturing

Job Summary


	We are seeking an experienced Human Resources Manager with a strong background in the manufacturing sector.
	The ideal candidate will oversee payroll, HR operations, labour relations, statutory compliance, and employee engagement while ensuring compliance with Nigerian labour laws.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage payroll administration and HR operations.
	Ensure compliance with statutory remittances (PAYE, PENCOM, NSITF, ITF, NHF).
	Liaise with government agencies and regulatory bodies.
	Manage union and industrial relations, including employee grievances.
	Oversee expatriate documentation and regulatory compliance.
	Maintain employee records, welfare, and performance-related HR processes.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree / HND in HR, Industrial Relations, Business Administration, Law, or a related field.
	Minimum of 5 years of HR experience in a manufacturing environment.
	Strong knowledge of payroll, labour law, statutory compliance, and union management.
	Experience in the plastic, sack, packaging, or FMCG industry is an added advantage.
	CIPM certification is an added advantage.
	Proficient in Microsoft Excel and HR systems.
	Preferred Candidate: Male.


Salary
N300,000 &ndash; N450,000 Net / Month.

Benefits:


	HMO
	Pension
	Annual Leave
	Performance-Based Incentives
	Other Statutory Benefits


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: jodazenintegratedservices@gmail.com using &quot;Human Resources Manager&quot; as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-08-15",

Human Resources Manager (Male) Job at Jodazen Integrated Services




        
    

        
        Jodazen Integrated Services is a trusted partner for businesses and individuals seeking seamless HR and travel solutions.

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Human Resources Manager (Male)

Job Location: Mile 2, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Manufacturing

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are seeking an experienced Human Resources Manager with a strong background in the manufacturing sector.
	The ideal candidate will oversee payroll, HR operations, labour relations, statutory compliance, and employee engagement while ensuring compliance with Nigerian labour laws.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage payroll administration and HR operations.
	Ensure compliance with statutory remittances (PAYE, PENCOM, NSITF, ITF, NHF).
	Liaise with government agencies and regulatory bodies.
	Manage union and industrial relations, including employee grievances.
	Oversee expatriate documentation and regulatory compliance.
	Maintain employee records, welfare, and performance-related HR processes.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree / HND in HR, Industrial Relations, Business Administration, Law, or a related field.
	Minimum of 5 years of HR experience in a manufacturing environment.
	Strong knowledge of payroll, labour law, statutory compliance, and union management.
	Experience in the plastic, sack, packaging, or FMCG industry is an added advantage.
	CIPM certification is an added advantage.
	Proficient in Microsoft Excel and HR systems.
	Preferred Candidate: Male.


Salary
N300,000 – N450,000 Net / Month.

Benefits:


	HMO
	Pension
	Annual Leave
	Performance-Based Incentives
	Other Statutory Benefits


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Human Resources Manager" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Development Officer",
  "description": "Accrete Energy Limited is a Nigerian firm that provides&nbsp;engineering solutions and software for the energy sector, formerly known as Accrete Petroleum Limited. It specializes in integrated asset modeling, digital oilfield solutions, and hydrocarbon accounting software, and offers related training and consultancy services. The company partners with other firms likePetroleum Experts LimitedandAdept Solutionto deliver localized services.&nbsp;

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:


Job Position:&nbsp;Business Development Officer

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	Accrete is expanding its footprint across the upstream oil and gas sector, and we are looking for candidates to join us on this drive.
	You will own client relationships end-to-end, shape how we go to market, and see your ideas turn into signed engagements and visible brand growth.
	Within your first year, you will have a real say in how Accrete positions itself to clients across the upstream oil industry.


What You Will Own
You will own four connected areas of the business development role, each building your competence toward the next:
Client Growth and Relationships:


	You will identify and pursue new business opportunities, build client engagement plans, and become the trusted point of contact who expands accounts over time.
	You will see the direct line between the relationships you build and the deals that close.


Brand and Market Presence:


	You will shape and execute digital marketing initiatives across LinkedIn, Facebook, and email, with real autonomy over content and campaign direction, then track what resonates and refine it.


Market Intelligence:


	You will research industry trends, competitor activity, and client needs, translating research into insights that directly inform Accrete&#39;s strategy.
	Your analysis will be reviewed and acted on by leadership, not filed away.


Events and Representation:


	You will coordinate and represent Accrete at industry workshops, trainings, and exhibitions, building your own professional network within the oil and gas ecosystem as you do.
	You will also maintain accurate pipeline and performance data and contribute regular insights that shape how the team operates.


What Success Looks Like


	We set clear, specific, and challenging targets together, not just a sales number, but visible milestones: qualified leads generated, new clients onboarded, market reports delivered, and campaigns launched.
	You will always know exactly where you stand and what the next milestone is.


Qualifications


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Economics, Management, Engineering, Physics, or a related field.
	Minimum of 2 years of proven experience in business development, sales, marketing, or client relationship management, preferably within the oil and gas industry.
	Minimum of Second Class Upper (2:1) or equivalent (relevant experience will be considered if below 2:1)
	A master&#39;s degree in a related field is an added advantage.
	Not more than 30 years of age as at 31st December 2026.


Skills We&#39;ll Help You Sharpen:


	Basic graphic design (Canva, Photoshop,).
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, PowerPoint, Word).
	Market research and competitive analysis.
	Analytical mindset with ability to interpret data and trends.
	Strong report-writing and data presentation.
	Excellent verbal and written communication.
	Confident presentation and public speaking.
	Strong negotiation, persuasion, and networking ability.


How You Will Grow


	A structured 90-day onboarding pairs you with the Business Development Manager to build your understanding of Accrete&#39;s service lines (Software Deployment, Technical Consultancy, Training) before you are expected to run client conversations solo.
	Quarterly goal-setting reviews with your manager set clear, specific targets &mdash; not vague expectations &mdash; so you always know what strong performance looks like and get direct feedback on your progress.
	High performers are considered for the Senior Business Development Officer role, with a clear path toward Business Development Lead and Manager for those who show strategic ownership.
	You will have access to mentorship from Accrete&#39;s technical consultants, giving you exposure to the engineering side of the business.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a cover letter &nbsp;to: staffing@accreteltd.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.&nbsp;",

Business Development Officer Job at Accrete Energy Limited




        
    

        
        Accrete Energy Limited is a Nigerian firm that provides engineering solutions and software for the energy sector, formerly known as Accrete Petroleum Limited. It specializes in integrated asset modeling, digital oilfield solutions, and hydrocarbon accounting software, and offers related training and consultancy services. The company partners with other firms likePetroleum Experts LimitedandAdept Solutionto deliver localized services. 

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:


Job Position: Business Development Officer

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview
     

            
    




	Accrete is expanding its footprint across the upstream oil and gas sector, and we are looking for candidates to join us on this drive.
	You will own client relationships end-to-end, shape how we go to market, and see your ideas turn into signed engagements and visible brand growth.
	Within your first year, you will have a real say in how Accrete positions itself to clients across the upstream oil industry.


What You Will Own
You will own four connected areas of the business development role, each building your competence toward the next:
Client Growth and Relationships:


	You will identify and pursue new business opportunities, build client engagement plans, and become the trusted point of contact who expands accounts over time.
	You will see the direct line between the relationships you build and the deals that close.


Brand and Market Presence:


	You will shape and execute digital marketing initiatives across LinkedIn, Facebook, and email, with real autonomy over content and campaign direction, then track what resonates and refine it.


Market Intelligence:


	You will research industry trends, competitor activity, and client needs, translating research into insights that directly inform Accrete's strategy.
	Your analysis will be reviewed and acted on by leadership, not filed away.


Events and Representation:


	You will coordinate and represent Accrete at industry workshops, trainings, and exhibitions, building your own professional network within the oil and gas ecosystem as you do.
	You will also maintain accurate pipeline and performance data and contribute regular insights that shape how the team operates.


What Success Looks Like


	We set clear, specific, and challenging targets together, not just a sales number, but visible milestones: qualified leads generated, new clients onboarded, market reports delivered, and campaigns launched.
	You will always know exactly where you stand and what the next milestone is.


Qualifications


	Bachelor's Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Economics, Management, Engineering, Physics, or a related field.
	Minimum of 2 years of proven experience in business development, sales, marketing, or client relationship management, preferably within the oil and gas industry.
	Minimum of Second Class Upper (2:1) or equivalent (relevant experience will be considered if below 2:1)
	A master's degree in a related field is an added advantage.
	Not more than 30 years of age as at 31st December 2026.


Skills We'll Help You Sharpen:


	Basic graphic design (Canva, Photoshop,).
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, PowerPoint, Word).
	Market research and competitive analysis.
	Analytical mindset with ability to interpret data and trends.
	Strong report-writing and data presentation.
	Excellent verbal and written communication.
	Confident presentation and public speaking.
	Strong negotiation, persuasion, and networking ability.


How You Will Grow


	A structured 90-day onboarding pairs you with the Business Development Manager to build your understanding of Accrete's service lines (Software Deployment, Technical Consultancy, Training) before you are expected to run client conversations solo.
	Quarterly goal-setting reviews with your manager set clear, specific targets — not vague expectations — so you always know what strong performance looks like and get direct feedback on your progress.
	High performers are considered for the Senior Business Development Officer role, with a clear path toward Business Development Lead and Manager for those who show strategic ownership.
	You will have access to mentorship from Accrete's technical consultants, giving you exposure to the engineering side of the business.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a cover letter  to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.     

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Telemarketer",
  "description": "Wisdom Kwati Smart City - We are a company dedicated to building sustainable cities by integrating smart technologies in our service delivery, thereby providing our clients with luxurious yet tremendously affordable real estate solutions as well as investment opportunities and property management.

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:
Job Position: Telemarketer
Job Location: Katampe District, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Telemarketer is responsible for converting company-generated sales leads to actual clients, promoting the Company&#39;s products and services, engaging prospective and existing customers through telephone and digital communication, scheduling appointments, and supporting the Sales Team in achieving business growth and revenue targets.
	The role requires excellent communication, persuasion, customer service, and relationship management skills.


Key Responsibilities


	Generate and qualify sales leads through outbound calls and follow-ups.
	Promote the Company&#39;s products and services to prospective customers.
	Schedule appointments and meetings for the Sales Team.
	Maintain positive customer relationships and provide excellent customer service.
	Handle customer enquiries, objections, and complaints professionally.
	Update customer information and call records in the CRM/database.
	Prepare daily, weekly, and monthly activity and performance reports.
	Meet assigned call, lead generation, appointment, and sales targets.
	Ensure compliance with Company policies, confidentiality requirements, and ethical sales practices.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree with 5-10 years of experience
	Excellent verbal and written communication.
	Strong sales, negotiation, and persuasion skills.
	Customer relationship management and active listening.
	Time management and organizational skills.
	Problem-solving and attention to detail.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and CRM software.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet performance targets.
	Teamwork, professionalism, and integrity.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 Monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to: careers@wisdomkwatismartcity.com using &quot;Telemarketer&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Social Media Manager / Video Editor / Graphics Designer Job at College Migration Limited




        
    

        
        College Migration Limited - Our client is  recruiting dynamic and creative candidates to lead its marketing and digital communication efforts in the capacity below: 

 Job Position: Social Media Manager / Video Editor / Graphics Designer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	The ideal candidate will develop and implement strategies that will strengthen the brand’s identity, enhance visibility, and drive engagement across all platforms.


Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Develop and execute comprehensive brand and marketing strategies.
	Manage digital channels, including social media, paid ads, and email campaigns.
	Create engaging content that drives awareness and audience growth.
	Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure brand consistency.
	Analyze campaign performance and optimize for results.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess relevant qualifications with experience.


Salary
N120,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
